description: Substrate confirmed clean at 81 layer nodes (5 hubs incl _triple-thesis, 4 symbols, 6 artists, 66 characters). Drift count: 0 — none observed in the recent-commission audit slice. Potion-rule body-audit surfaces five candidate retrofit targets — phrases that claim the canon articulated the BBL thesis where in fact BBL is articulating the thesis on top of the canon. Behold: visibility on the lens, not free passes for canonical-vs-curatorial slippage. None retrofitted this wave per single-cluster-retrofit-per-future-wave rule.

potion_rule_audit_findings.offending_phrase: the franchise's clearest two-character apparatus-of-extraction articulations
potion_rule_audit_findings.issue: Claims Toriyama articulated the apparatus-of-extraction thesis via the Goku-Hercule labor-and-credit relationship. He did not. He articulated celebrity-credit-theft as comedic pathos. BBL articulates the apparatus-of-extraction reading on top.
potion_rule_audit_findings.retrofit_suggestion: BBL reads the Goku-Hercule canonical labor-and-credit relationship as one of the franchise's clearest two-character apparatus-of-extraction case studies.

potion_rule_audit_findings.offending_phrase: the franchise's clearest single-image stewardship-register attestation
potion_rule_audit_findings.issue: Claims Toriyama-and-Toei canonically articulated the stewardship register via the Gohan-wears-Piccolo's-gi beat. They articulated mentorship-imagery; BBL applies the stewardship-register reading.
potion_rule_audit_findings.retrofit_suggestion: BBL reads the canonical Gohan-wears-Piccolo's-gi-into-the-Cell-Games beat as one of the franchise's clearest single-image carriers of the stewardship-register reading.

potion_rule_audit_findings.issue: Claims Game-Freak / The Pokemon Company articulated the apparatus-of-extraction-as-corporate-philanthropic-cover thesis. They articulated 'Lusamine is the actual villain' as plot twist. BBL applies the apparatus-of-extraction reading.
potion_rule_audit_findings.retrofit_suggestion: BBL reads Aether Foundation as the franchise's clearest case-study in corporate-philanthropic-cover-as-actual-apex-villainy at regional-charity scale.

potion_rule_audit_findings.offending_phrase: The labor-coded reading is the franchise's clearest case of an apparatus-of-bio-engineered-weapon-production rendered as character-cohort
potion_rule_audit_findings.issue: Almost rule-following — uses 'reading' (good), but still ascribes the franchise as articulator. The canon-event is Towa engineers Mira from genetic templates; the BBL reading is apparatus-of-bio-engineered-weapon-production.
potion_rule_audit_findings.retrofit_suggestion: BBL reads Towa's bio-engineering-Mira canonical operation as the franchise's clearest single-character apparatus-of-bio-engineered-weapon-production case-study.

potion_rule_audit_findings.issue: Less severe — this is an analytical-frame statement, not a canon-articulation claim. Acceptable under Potion-Rule but borderline. Flag for future review if subsequent retrofit pass surfaces a cleaner phrasing.
potion_rule_audit_findings.retrofit_suggestion: Leave as-is for now; revisit if subsequent retrofit pass standardizes the analytical-frame register.

voice_note: Substrate clean. Audit found five candidate retrofit targets. None retrofitted — single-cluster-per-future-wave discipline holds. The Potion Rule is doing its job; the offending phrases are exactly the kind of analytic-pressure-outrunning-canon-support failure mode the rule was named to prevent. Pleased the doctrine survived first contact with the existing corpus.
